name: Zenith
description: Deploy the radar disc to reveal hidden enemies and then strike with precision shots that punch through all obstacles in the way.

components.description: Deploy the radar disc to reveal hidden enemies and then strike with precision shots that punch through all obstacles in the way.

Various electronic components.

patchlogs.name: Update 32.2.0: Lua’s Prey
patchlogs.changes: Removed the Wolf Sledge, Telos Boltace, Zenith, Tatsu, Tatsu Prime, and Staticor from Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Update 32
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed swapping to Alt-fire on the Zenith breaking its functionality for the remainder of the mission

patchlogs.name: Update 29.10.0: Corpus Proxima & The New Railjack
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Zenith’s Alt Fire mode swapping not working if you roll at the same time.

patchlogs.name: Derelict Shift: Update 28.3.0
patchlogs.changes: Added the ‘infinite’ UI symbol to the Zeniths Secondary Fire Punch Through.

patchlogs.name: Update 28: The Deadlock Protocol
patchlogs.additions: Added login milestone reward blueprints (Zenistar, Azima, Zenith, and Sigma & Octantis) to Simaris' Offerings.
patchlogs.changes:
Thankfully, you can use these Granum Crowns to your advantage. Collect three tiers of Crowns from Treasurers in your Missions, each signifying a higher level of devotion than the last: Granum Crown, Exemplar Granum Crown, and Zenith Granum Crown. Use them to initiate challenges in Missions, search for Corpus Temple Reliefs or negotiate the release of Solaris prisoners in exchange for Standing.
31+: Zenith Granum Crown

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Railjack Revisited (Part 1): Update 27.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Zenith’s firing sound FX doubling for other players.

patchlogs.name: Wukong Deluxe: Update 25.5.0 + 25.5.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Zenith sometimes getting stuck only firing one semi-auto shot before reverting to auto.

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Hotfix 25.0.2 + 25.0.2.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Zenith sometimes Alt Firing/Reloading at the same time.

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Update 25
patchlogs.changes:
Zenith Alt Fire Ammo cost reduced from 5 to 3.
Zenith’s Alt Fire radar deployable is now Ammo based instead of duration.

patchlogs.name: Chimera: Update 23.10
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Zenith alt-fire projectile showing enemies with the Warframe Energy color. It now uses the Zenith Energy color.

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Update 23
patchlogs.changes: Punch Through Mods no longer affect the Zenith’s Alternate Fire deployable disc.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Zenith appearing to have 3 Alt-Firing modes in the Arsenal.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Hotfix 22.17.1 - 22.17.1.1
patchlogs.changes: Azima, Zenistar, and Zenith will now show in your Profile.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Zephyr Prime 22.16.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Zenith Alt-Fire not being able to shoot through all objects with respect to those that prevent Punch Through.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Hotfix 22.13.3
patchlogs.changes: Increased the Fire Rate of the Zenith's Alt Fire.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.8.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed using Alt Fire key to detonate Zenith disc when both discs of Zenistar and Zenith weapon has been launched resulting in the detonation removing the HUD icon for Zenistar disc.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.0.9
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed buff indicator for the Zenith disc lifespan not being removed if you recall the disc manually.

patchlogs.name: Update 21: Chains of Harrow
patchlogs.changes: Added a UI indicator to Zenith (just like Zenistar) that shows how much time you have left on the disc before it's automatically recalled.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed missing mesh on the Zenith. 
Fixed Zenith’s radar not highlighting enemies behind closed doors.

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Hotfix 20.2.4
patchlogs.changes: Updated Zenith’s description to better explain its functionality.

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Hotfix 20.2.3
patchlogs.changes: Fixed an issue with the Azima and Zenith doing more damage than intended in Conclave.
